prose:
**Formaldehyde frontier-orbital gap** — DFT, tier `standard` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, density-fitted) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1.
Geometry: single-point on the user-supplied `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/formaldehyde/formaldehyde.xyz` (no geometry optimization).
SCF converged in 8 cycles; no warnings reported.
HOMO = –7.6523067 eV; LUMO = –1.7826355 eV → **gap = 5.8696712 eV** (Koopmans‐style).

Command:
```
/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier \
 --method dft --tier standard --charge 0 --multiplicity 1 \
 /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/formaldehyde/formaldehyde.xyz \
 --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmp8irf1vxz/live.json
```
